name: Houtini LM
description: MCP server that connects Claude to any OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. Offload routine analysis to a local model and preserve your Claude context window.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model identifier to use for requests (auto-detected if not set)

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for API authentication (no auth if blank)
